input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.10.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.10.1.1
            TITLE: the sound level will be measured during a stationary test, with the vehicle gearbox in neutral

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.10.1.1: The sound level will be measured during a stationary test, with the vehicle gearbox in neutral
IN.10.1.1 The sound level will be measured during a stationary test, with the vehicle gearbox in neutral 
at the defined Test Speed

final_answer: The sound level will be measured during a stationary test, with the vehicle gearbox in neutral at the defined Test Speed
